name: Gargomon

signature_move.name: White Statue
signature_move.description: Summons a giant demon statue to attack the enemy.

description: An Armor-level Demon Beast Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Light ". It was originally a Devil-type Digimon, but its power was suppressed using restraints, and there are instances where it is employed as a familiar for Angel Digimon. It is said that once it is freed from those restraints, it will exhibit tremendous power. Its Special Move is summoning a giant demon statue, and attacking the enemy ( White Statue ).
